title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: Junior cloud engineers should prioritize understanding cloud fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, performance, and maintainability rather than coding alone, and leverage AI agents to accelerate work while validating outputs against core principles. The video argues that knowing what to build and why is now more important than raw coding ability.
